features: Gold Glitter Mesh Ribbon: Gold clitter mesh ribbon is richly coloured with a bright and vibrant yellow colour can quickly attracts attention
Mesh Decorative Ribbon: Mesh decorative ribbon is easy to mix and match, yellow mesh sequin embossed ribbon can be blended with other crafts
Size: There is 1 roll of gold sparkle mesh ribbon 9.84 yards in total. Gold glitter mesh ribbon: width: 2.48 inch ( 63mm), 9.84 yard/ roll. ( 9m/ roll)
Material: Christmas mesh ribbon is made of polyester fibre, more durable and wear resistant, suitable for long time use
Wide Use: Christmas mesh ribbon is mainly used in various sewing craft activities, such as wreaths, Christmas tree decorations, gift wrapping, parties, wedding dresses, skirts and so on
description: Product Description CABODYALS, the sewing expert by your side. We understand that sewing is not only a craft, but also an expression of art and emotion. Since inception, CABODYALS has been committed to providing sewing enthusiasts with the highest quality sewing products. Our product line covers everything from basic sewing ribbons, laces, threads, embroidery patches, etc. Each product is carefully selected to ensure that fulfill your ultimate pursuit of the sewing. Flower Embroidered Ribbon Trim Flower Embroidered Ribbon: Red represents warmth and enthusiasm, flower embroidered ribbon with bright red as the main color, used to embellish monotonous color clothing or fabric is very suitable Pink Chiffon Fringe Ribbon Pink Chiffon Ribbon: The pink chiffon ribbon is a very gentle gray pink color, handmade tassel edges, make the pink chiffon ribbon become more natural, soft and look more layered Sheer Ribbon Christmas Wrapping Ribbon Dark Red Sheer Ribbon: Red represents enthusiasm and warmth, but also as the representative color of Christmas, using dark red sheer ribbon to decorate the Christmas party or gift box is very appropriate, very much in line with the atmosphere of Christmas Flower Jacquard Ribbon Trim 3D Jacquard Ribbon Trim Red: The jacquard ribbon trim red with a very textured dark red as the base color, both sides of the gold color edge, sewing 3d orange and red flowers and green leaves, the overall color matching harmony, very unique and texture RIBBON AND TRIM Fruit Printed Ribbon Fruit Printed Ribbon: The fruit printed ribbon with white as the base color, single sided printing embellished with full printed strawberries, both simple and special, very suitable for decorating monotonous clothes or hats, decorating the plain life with lovely strawberries Christmas Print Ribbon Wired Christmas Ribbon Wired Red: The christmas ribbon wired with red as the main color, which is the representative color of Christmas, with gold stars and merry christmas word, can create a strong Christmas atmosphere for you Rick Rack Wave Trim Rick Rack Trim Ribbon: Rick rack trim ribbon is simple, clean white and is generous wave shape that works well with any color of sewing accessory for a larger range of crafts Organza Lace Ribbon Trim Navy Blue Lace Ribbon: The navy blue lace ribbon is a very textured dark blue color, double ruffled organza fabric with an elastic velvet in the center, making the navy blue lace ribbon look lighter and more layered Cute Cartoon Embroidered Appliques Easy to use The applique patch have hot melt adhesive, both ironing and sewing are very convenient Ironing and Sewing Multiple Uses Color Bright Patches Apples Patches Iron on Apple Patches Iron On: Christmas Eve to send apples is the best blessing to each other, the apples patches iron on sewed on clothing or shoes and socks, not only can be used as a decorative, add festive atmosphere, but also as clothing repair accessories decoration, both a good moral and practical High Quality: The cute iron on patches use high quality polyester fiber, sturdy and wear resistant, embroidery color bright and not easy to fade, can be used repeatedly over a long period of time Multiple Uses: The apples patches can be used to decorate clothes to show your personality. In addition, apples patches with good meaning are very suitable as gifts at Christmas, back to school season HOW TO USE IRON ON PATCHES STEP 1 Put patch on your clothes, embroidery side up STEP 2 Place cotton fabric over patch STEP 3 Iron over patch on high for about 30s Iron inside of garment undermeath 30s EASY TO USE Ironing and Sewing Multiple Uses Color Bright Fingerless Gloves Furry Fingerless Gloves White Furry Fingerless Gloves: The white furry fingerless gloves are white furry and knitted style, simple but not lose the sense of fashion, suitable for daily life or festivals Knit Fingerless Gloves Brown Knit Fingerless Gloves: The brown knit fingerless gloves are warm and elegant coffee color with unique diamond knit pattern, adding classic color to a dull winter Fingerless Knit Gloves Cute Fingerless Gloves: The cute fingerless gloves are in soft beige color to bring warmth and softness to your winter look, with red love heart pattern to make the cute fingerless gloves look more romantic and sweet Halloween Arm Warmers Halloween Arm Warmers: The winter is coming, are you still looking for gloves that are both warm and show your personality, halloween arm warmers are classic retro punk style with purple as the main color and skull pattern
